issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all possible error scenarios and edge cases, such as network failures or provider-specific errors.
The skill provides high-level guidance and example outputs but lacks concrete, runnable code snippets or step-by-step procedures.

scenarios.name: express-google-oauth-jwt
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers the required migration, PKCE OAuth, JWT service, middleware, and mentions tests, while Response B lacks the migration, refresh token rotation, and test coverage.

scenarios.name: django-github-multi-tenant-rbac
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items (models, migration, middleware, decorator) but lacks django‑allauth integration; Response B omits middleware, decorator, tests, and migration, making it less complete.
